title: WATERFORD – Tonight Assemblymember Alanis presented a framed copy of AB 1467 to the family of Nevaeh Johnson in a touching tribute before the kickoff of the “Black & Blue Bowl” you

claims.claim_text: AB 1467 requires youth sports organizations across the state to provide their athletes with accessibility to an automated external defibrillator (AED) during official practices or matches.
Nevaeh Johnson collapsed during a sports practice in Waterford in August 2022 due to a brain aneurysm and her heart had stopped.
Nevaeh Johnson's family believes that if an AED was accessible at the time of her incident, she would still be alive today.
